author: notenerd
description: A real terminal with shell integration and beginner-friendly command help, plus a review workflow for Claude Code file edits: word-level diffs, undo, backlink-breakage warnings, and more. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: NoteNerd
manifest.description: A real terminal with shell integration and beginner-friendly command help, plus a review workflow for Claude Code file edits: word-level diffs, undo, backlink-breakage warnings, and more.
manifest.name: Terminus

name: Terminus

releases.author: NoteNerdOfficial
releases.description: Restore slider value tooltips (font size, scrollback, reveal delay) that regressed on older Obsidian versions, and fix recurring terminal glyph/row corruption caused by fonts that lazy-load subset files after the initial remeasure.

releases.author: NoteNerdOfficial
releases.description: Fix stale terminal glyph-cell metrics after the custom monospace font finishes loading, which could leave block-art (e.g. QR codes) with visible row gaps and stray tofu glyphs.

releases.author: NoteNerdOfficial
releases.description: Fixes terminal corruption (garbled/misaligned text, stray literal escape sequences like ^[[O) caused by DEC private modes (focus reporting, bracketed paste, mouse tracking) getting left enabled by a foreground program -- including Claude Code's own CLI -- and leaking into the plain shell afterward. Also fixes the same class of corruption showing up after restoring a saved terminal session.

releases.author: NoteNerdOfficial
releases.description: Fixes the terminal color picker getting cut off in narrow panes (now clamps to the viewport and wraps), adds more color options, and fixes text misalignment/garbled glyphs that could persist after a custom or Nerd Font finished loading.

releases.author: NoteNerdOfficial
releases.description: Rename and color-code terminals (native tab + Pending Changes group, persisted across restarts). Drag-and-drop file/note paths into the terminal input. Wiki-link autocomplete (type [[ for a fuzzy note picker). Terminals resume their last working directory on restart. Rescue closed terminal recovers an accidentally-closed tab's transcript, cwd, name, and color. New settings: font family, cursor style/blink, scrollback size, auto light/dark terminal theme, startup command, and ribbon icon.

releases.author: NoteNerdOfficial
releases.description: Fix: Explain/Suggest-fix claude calls used the same execFileText helper as Cited's query path, which left the child's stdin open and unwritten -- could make claude wait unnecessarily and sometimes exit non-zero. Stdin is now closed immediately (bumped terminus-node-bridge to 1.3.1).

releases.author: NoteNerdOfficial
releases.description: Fix: on networks that require a proxy (common on corporate machines), Terminus's Explain/Suggest-fix claude calls could silently hang and time out instead of failing fast -- Obsidian's process doesn't inherit the login shell's proxy env vars. Now forwards the login shell's environment to the spawned claude process.

releases.author: NoteNerdOfficial
releases.description: Fix: login-shell claude/python3 lookup could silently fail on machines where a login shell prints extra text (session-save hooks, MOTD, etc.) around the resolved path -- now scans all output lines instead of trusting the last one.
